violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Laminate was missing on the cabinet drawers and doors, side of cabinets, and counter in the kitchen area.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The outside area around the door to freezer 3 needs to be cleaned.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. Clean food storage containers were being stored on a cloth towel on the shelf below the food warmers.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. The hand sink in the kitchen did not have soap available to wash hands.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Paper towels were not available at the hand sink in the kitchen area.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
